title: DiscretionaryFundingAward
description: A capital or expense budget allocation made by the Staten Island Borough President. Under the NYC Charter the BP receives a share of the city capital and expense budget to allocate to agencies, institutions, and community organizations in the borough. NET-NEW as data: requests are accepted only 'via mail or email' (statenislandusa.com/budget.html) and awards appear only inside the adopted citywide budget / Schedule C — there is no BPSI award dataset or API. Modeled from the office's charter role.

x-source.citywide_system: NYC Adopted Budget — Schedule C (expense) / capital commitment plan

fiscalYear.description: City fiscal year of the allocation (e.g. 2026).

purpose.description: Description of the funded project or program.

sponsoringAgency.description: The city agency administering the funds.
